'''Inacc's Shipping''' was a small time business run by the businessman [[Gol Inacc]]. During the height of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], this company provided cheap shipping for [[Estaria Central Starport]] with its one ship, the ''[[Inacc's Crate]]''.<ref name="HS" />
